'''Hyos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Codru-Ji]] [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] on [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] while [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] made a diplomatic visit there in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. When a [[pressure bomb]] had gone off, and the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo children]] had been kidnapped and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] was badly injured, she was the doctor who treated him. At one time she had been a battlefield surgeon.

{{Char-stub}}
